settingsDescription: Manage your identity, preferences, and governance participation.
identityDescription: Your principal, wallet address, and Internet Identity.

aria.iiLink: Manage your Internet Identity (opens in new tab)

themeDescription: Select your preferred theme for the application.

access.title: Account status
access.descParticipating: This account is participating in Internet Computer governance.
access.descNotParticipating: This account is not currently participating in Internet Computer governance.

learnHowModal.title: Governance participation
learnHowModal.content: To participate in governance, you need to lock ICP tokens into neurons. Neurons allow you to vote on proposals and mint rewards for your participation. The more ICP you lock and the longer you lock it for, the more voting power you have.

systemContext.title: Network Nervous System
systemContext.description: The Network Nervous System governs protocol upgrades, economic parameters, and the evolution of the Internet Computer.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Enable or disable keyboard shortcuts for quick actions.

hideBalances.title: Hide balances
hideBalances.description: Hide ICP and USD values across the app for privacy.

subaccounts.label: Multiple accounts
subaccounts.description: View and manage multiple accounts linked to your principal.
subaccounts.enabledDescription: Multiple accounts are now visible and editable.
subaccounts.disabledDescription: Multiple accounts related features are now hidden.

advancedFollowing.label: Advanced following
advancedFollowing.description: Follow different known neurons per topic across all your neurons.
advancedFollowing.enabledDescription: Per-topic following configuration is now available.
advancedFollowing.disabledDescription: Per-topic following management is now hidden. Your existing following configuration is preserved.

showSpamProposals.label: Show all proposals
showSpamProposals.description: Display proposals flagged as spam or non-constructive. These are hidden by default.

aria.toggle: Toggle visibility of spam and non-constructive proposals

showSpamProposals.enabledDescription: Spam and non-constructive proposals are now shown with a warning badge.
showSpamProposals.disabledDescription: Proposals flagged as spam or non-constructive are now hidden from the list.
